---
title: "Equipe"
subtitle: "Pesquisadores, instituições e colaboradores do projeto Tsiino Hiiwiida"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
execute:
  echo: false
  eval: true
  freeze: false
  cache: false
  warning: false
  message: false
resources:
  - ../figures/
  - ../figures/brand/
  - ../_input_data/
  - ../_input_data/tsiino_team_images/
  - ../_input_data/icons/
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)

library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(htmltools)
library(openxlsx)

find_up <- function(rel_path, start = getwd(), max_levels = 8) {
  d <- normalizePath(start, winslash = "/", mustWork = FALSE)
  for (i in 0:max_levels) {
    cand <- file.path(d, rel_path)
    if (file.exists(cand)) return(cand)
    parent <- dirname(d)
    if (identical(parent, d)) break
    d <- parent
  }
  NA_character_
}

nz <- function(x) {
  !is.na(x) & nzchar(trimws(as.character(x)))
}

safe_html <- function(x) {
  x <- as.character(x)
  x[is.na(x) | trimws(x) == ""] <- "—"
  htmltools::htmlEscape(x)
}

slugify <- function(x) {
  x <- as.character(x)
  x[is.na(x) | trimws(x) == ""] <- "membro"
  x <- iconv(x, from = "UTF-8", to = "ASCII//TRANSLIT")
  x <- tolower(x)
  x <- gsub("[^a-z0-9]+", "-", x)
  x <- gsub("(^-+|-+$)", "", x)
  x[x == ""] <- "membro"
  make.unique(x, sep = "-")
}

normalize_name <- function(x) {
  x <- as.character(x)
  x <- iconv(x, from = "UTF-8", to = "ASCII//TRANSLIT")
  x <- tolower(x)
  x <- gsub("[^a-z0-9]+", " ", x)
  x <- trimws(gsub("\\s+", " ", x))
  x
}

normalize_col_id <- function(x) {
  x <- as.character(x)
  x <- iconv(x, from = "UTF-8", to = "ASCII//TRANSLIT")
  x <- tolower(x)
  x <- gsub("[^a-z0-9]+", "", x)
  x
}

get_col <- function(data, candidates, required = TRUE, label = NULL) {
  hit <- intersect(candidates, names(data))
  if (length(hit) > 0) return(hit[1])

  data_names_norm <- normalize_col_id(names(data))
  candidates_norm <- normalize_col_id(candidates)
  hit_norm <- which(data_names_norm %in% candidates_norm)
  if (length(hit_norm) > 0) return(names(data)[hit_norm[1]])

  if (required) {
    stop(
      "Não encontrei a coluna ", ifelse(is.null(label), paste(candidates, collapse = "/"), label), ".\n",
      "Colunas disponíveis no input: ", paste(names(data), collapse = ", ")
    )
  }
  NA_character_
}

get_value <- function(row, possible_names, default = "") {
  for (name in possible_names) {
    if (name %in% names(row)) {
      value <- row[[name]][1]
      if (!is.na(value) && nzchar(trimws(as.character(value)))) {
        return(as.character(value))
      }
    }
  }

  row_names_norm <- normalize_col_id(names(row))
  possible_norm <- normalize_col_id(possible_names)
  hit <- which(row_names_norm %in% possible_norm)

  if (length(hit) > 0) {
    value <- row[[hit[1]]][1]
    if (!is.na(value) && nzchar(trimws(as.character(value)))) {
      return(as.character(value))
    }
  }

  default
}

make_photo_filename <- function(member_name) {
  x <- tolower(member_name)
  x <- iconv(x, from = "UTF-8", to = "ASCII//TRANSLIT")
  x <- gsub("[^a-z0-9]+", "_", x)
  x <- gsub("_+", "_", x)
  x <- gsub("^_|_$", "", x)
  paste0(x, ".jpg")
}

team_path <- find_up(file.path("_input_data", "tsiino_hiiwiida_team.xlsx"))
if (is.na(team_path)) {
  stop("Não encontrei o arquivo '_input_data/tsiino_hiiwiida_team.xlsx'.")
}

team_data <- openxlsx::read.xlsx(team_path)
names(team_data) <- make.names(names(team_data))

member_col <- get_col(team_data, c("Member", "Nome", "Name", "Membro", "Pessoa"), label = "nome do membro")
if (member_col != "Member") {
  team_data$Member <- as.character(team_data[[member_col]])
}
team_data$Member <- trimws(as.character(team_data$Member))
team_data <- team_data[nz(team_data$Member), , drop = FALSE]

photo_dir_abs <- file.path(dirname(team_path), "tsiino_team_images")
photo_dir_html <- "../_input_data/tsiino_team_images"

default_candidates <- c("default.jpg", "default.jpeg", "default.png")
default_file <- default_candidates[file.exists(file.path(photo_dir_abs, default_candidates))][1]
if (is.na(default_file)) default_file <- "default.jpg"

team_data <- team_data |>
  mutate(
    member_key = normalize_name(Member),
    member_slug = slugify(Member),
    first_letter = toupper(substr(normalize_name(Member), 1, 1)),
    photo_file = make_photo_filename(Member),
    photo_path = ifelse(
      file.exists(file.path(photo_dir_abs, photo_file)),
      file.path(photo_dir_html, photo_file),
      file.path(photo_dir_html, default_file)
    ) |>
      gsub("\\\\", "/", x = _)
  )

responsible_names <- c(
  "Charles Zartman",
  "Domingos Cardoso",
  "Sandra Knapp",
  "Anna Luiza Ilkiu-Borges",
  "Clistenes Williams Araújo do Nascimento",
  "Dirce Komura",
  "Denilson Fernandes Peralta",
  "Felipe Wartchow",
  "Micheline Carvalho-Silva"
)

responsible_keys <- normalize_name(responsible_names)
team_data$responsible_rank <- match(team_data$member_key, responsible_keys)
team_data$team_role <- ifelse(!is.na(team_data$responsible_rank), "responsavel", "integrante")

responsaveis <- team_data |>
  filter(team_role == "responsavel") |>
  arrange(responsible_rank, Member)

integrantes <- team_data |>
  filter(team_role == "integrante") |>
  arrange(Member)

team_ordered <- bind_rows(responsaveis, integrantes)
```

```{=html}
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Montserrat:wght@400;500;600;700;800;900&family=Source+Serif+4:opsz,wght@8..60,400;8..60,600;8..60,700&family=Space+Mono:wght@400;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

<style>
  :root{
    --red: #A93632;
    --red-dark: #6E1F1D;
    --green: #626A38;
    --green-map: #59602F;
    --green-dark: #2E3B24;
    --green-soft: #D7DDC5;
    --ochre: #D99A27;
    --cream: #F6F1E8;
    --paper: #FFFDF7;
    --ink: #171717;
    --muted: #675F55;
    --line: rgba(98,106,56,0.24);
  }

  *{
    box-sizing: border-box;
  }

  html{
    scroll-behavior: smooth;
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 100%;
    overflow-x: hidden !important;
    margin-top: 0 !important;
    padding-top: 0 !important;
  }

  body{
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 100%;
    overflow-x: hidden !important;
    margin-top: 0 !important;
    padding-top: 0 !important;
    background:
      linear-gradient(rgba(246,241,232,0.88), rgba(246,241,232,0.88)),
      url("../figures/tsiino_bg.png");
    background-repeat: no-repeat;
    background-size: cover;
    background-attachment: fixed;
    background-position: center top;
    font-family: 'Montserrat', Arial, sans-serif;
    color: var(--ink);
  }

  body.nav-fixed{
    margin-top: 0 !important;
    padding-top: 0 !important;
  }

  #quarto-content,
  .page-columns,
  .page-layout-full,
  main.content,
  main,
  .content{
    width: 100%;
    background: transparent !important;
    margin-top: 0 !important;
    padding-top: 0 !important;
  }

  main.content{
    padding-bottom: 3.5rem;
  }

  .quarto-title-block{
    display: none !important;
  }

  /* NAVBAR SOBRE HERO */

  #quarto-header{
    position: absolute !important;
    top: 0 !important;
    left: 0 !important;
    right: 0 !important;
    z-index: 10000 !important;
    background: transparent !important;
    border: 0 !important;
    box-shadow: none !important;
  }

  #quarto-header .navbar{
    position: relative !important;
    top: 0 !important;
    margin-top: 0 !important;
    background: transparent !important;
    box-shadow: none !important;
    border: 0 !important;
    border-bottom: 0 !important;
    min-height: 76px;
    backdrop-filter: none !important;
    -webkit-backdrop-filter: none !important;
  }

  #quarto-header::before{
    content: "";
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0 0 auto 0;
    height: 120px;
    background: linear-gradient(
      180deg,
      rgba(0,0,0,0.44) 0%,
      rgba(0,0,0,0.20) 58%,
      rgba(0,0,0,0) 100%
    );
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: -1;
  }

  #quarto-header .navbar-brand{
    display: none !important;
  }

  #quarto-header .navbar .nav-link,
  #quarto-header .navbar .nav-link:visited{
    color: #fff !important;
    font-family: 'Montserrat', Arial, sans-serif;
    text-shadow: 0 2px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.72);
  }

  #quarto-header .navbar .nav-link.active,
  #quarto-header .navbar .nav-link:hover{
    color: var(--ochre) !important;
  }

  #quarto-header .navbar svg,
  #quarto-header .navbar i,
  #quarto-header .navbar .bi,
  #quarto-header .quarto-navbar-tools a,
  #quarto-header .quarto-navbar-tools button,
  #quarto-header .aa-DetachedSearchButton,
  #quarto-header .aa-DetachedSearchButtonIcon,
  #quarto-header .quarto-color-scheme-toggle{
    color: #fff !important;
    fill: #fff !important;
    filter: drop-shadow(0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.55));
  }

  /* HERO DE SUBPÁGINA */

  .page-hero{
    position: relative;
    left: 50%;
    transform: translateX(-50%);
    width: 100vw;
    max-width: 100vw;
    min-height: min(72vh, 720px);
    margin: 0 !important;
    padding: 0 !important;
    overflow: hidden;
    isolation: isolate;
    background-size: cover;
    background-position: center center;
    box-shadow: none;
  }

  @supports (width: 100dvw){
    .page-hero{
      width: 100dvw;
      max-width: 100dvw;
    }
  }

  .page-hero-team{
    background-image:
      linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(0,0,0,0.78) 0%, rgba(0,0,0,0.48) 45%, rgba(0,0,0,0.12) 100%),
      linear-gradient(rgba(110,31,29,0.58), rgba(110,31,29,0.58)),
      url("../figures/tsiino_bg.png");
  }

  .page-hero-overlay{
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    z-index: -2;
    background:
      linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(0,0,0,0.74) 0%, rgba(0,0,0,0.48) 44%, rgba(0,0,0,0.12) 100%),
      linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(0,0,0,0.10) 0%, rgba(0,0,0,0.22) 52%, rgba(0,0,0,0.72) 100%);
  }

  .page-hero-logo{
    position: absolute;
    top: clamp(5.2rem, 9vw, 7rem);
    left: clamp(1.5rem, 3.5vw, 2.5rem);
    width: clamp(82px, 7vw, 120px);
    z-index: 5;
  }

  .page-hero-logo img{
    width: 100%;
    height: auto;
    display: block;
    filter: drop-shadow(0 8px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.35));
  }

  .page-hero-content{
    position: absolute;
    left: clamp(2rem, 5vw, 5rem);
    top: clamp(13.5rem, 30vh, 17rem);
    width: min(900px, calc(100% - 4rem));
    color: #fff;
    z-index: 4;
  }

  .hero-kicker{
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: clamp(0.68rem, 1vw, 0.82rem);
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.13em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--ochre);
    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
    text-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.65);
  }

  .page-hero-content h1{
    margin: 0;
    color: #fff;
    font-family: 'Montserrat', Arial, sans-serif;
    font-size: clamp(3.2rem, 7vw, 6.2rem);
    line-height: 0.9;
    font-weight: 900;
    letter-spacing: -0.07em;
    text-shadow: 0 3px 26px rgba(0,0,0,0.75);
  }

  .hero-subtitle{
    margin: 1rem 0 0 0 !important;
    color: #F6F1E8 !important;
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace !important;
    font-size: clamp(0.78rem, 1.45vw, 1.05rem) !important;
    font-weight: 700 !important;
    letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    line-height: 1.45 !important;
    text-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.70);
  }

  .hero-description{
    margin: 0.9rem 0 0 0 !important;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.92) !important;
    font-size: clamp(1rem, 1.6vw, 1.25rem) !important;
    line-height: 1.58 !important;
    max-width: 760px;
    text-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.68);
  }

  .hero-actions{
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 0.65rem;
    margin-top: 1.25rem;
  }

  .btn-main,
  .btn-ghost{
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 0.45rem;
    padding: 0.68rem 1.05rem;
    border-radius: 999px;
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.06em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    text-decoration: none !important;
    transition: transform 0.18s ease, box-shadow 0.18s ease, background 0.18s ease;
  }

  .btn-main{
    background: var(--red);
    color: #fff !important;
    box-shadow: 0 8px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.28);
  }

  .btn-ghost{
    background: rgba(246,241,232,0.90);
    color: var(--green-dark) !important;
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.72);
  }

  .btn-main:hover,
  .btn-ghost:hover{
    transform: translateY(-1px);
    box-shadow: 0 10px 22px rgba(0,0,0,0.24);
  }

  /* ESTRUTURA GERAL */

  .content-card{
    width: min(1280px, calc(100% - 2rem));
    margin: 2.6rem auto 0 auto;
    padding: clamp(1.35rem, 3vw, 2.35rem);
    background: rgba(255,253,247,0.96);
    box-shadow: 0 15px 34px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
    border-top: 5px solid var(--green);
  }

  .section-title{
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 96px 1fr;
    gap: 0.75rem;
    align-items: center;
    margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
  }

  .section-title::before{
    content: "";
    display: block;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--ink);
  }

  .section-title h2{
    margin: 0;
    padding-bottom: 0.45rem;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.18);
    font-size: clamp(1.2rem, 2.6vw, 1.85rem);
    font-weight: 800;
    color: var(--red);
    letter-spacing: 0.01em;
  }

  .content-card p{
    font-family: 'Montserrat', Arial, sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.98rem;
    line-height: 1.72;
    color: var(--ink);
    margin: 0 0 1rem 0;
  }

  .lead{
    font-family: 'Source Serif 4', Georgia, serif !important;
    font-size: clamp(1.08rem, 2vw, 1.26rem) !important;
    line-height: 1.72 !important;
    color: #191711 !important;
    border-left: 4px solid var(--ochre);
    padding-left: 1rem;
    margin-bottom: 1.3rem !important;
  }

  .team-overview-grid{
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(280px, 0.45fr);
    gap: 1.25rem;
    align-items: stretch;
  }

  .team-summary-box{
    display: grid;
    align-content: center;
    gap: 0.8rem;
    padding: 1rem;
    border-radius: 18px;
    background:
      linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(98,106,56,0.14), rgba(217,154,39,0.08)),
      rgba(246,241,232,0.72);
    border: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.18);
  }

  .team-summary-box div{
    padding-bottom: 0.8rem;
    border-bottom: 1px dashed rgba(98,106,56,0.24);
  }

  .team-summary-box div:last-child{
    padding-bottom: 0;
    border-bottom: 0;
  }

  .team-number{
    display: block;
    color: var(--red);
    font-size: 1.6rem;
    font-weight: 900;
    line-height: 1.1;
  }

  .team-label{
    display: block;
    margin-top: 0.3rem;
    color: var(--green-dark);
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 0.66rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }

  /* CONTROLES */

  .team-controls{
    width: min(1280px, calc(100% - 2rem));
    margin: 1.4rem auto 0 auto;
    padding: 1rem;
    background: rgba(255,253,247,0.94);
    border: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.18);
    box-shadow: 0 10px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
    display: grid;
    gap: 0.9rem;
    align-items: center;
  }

  .team-search-row{
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 0.8rem;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
  }

  .team-search{
    flex: 1 1 320px;
    min-width: 0;
    padding: 0.72rem 0.9rem;
    border-radius: 999px;
    border: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.30);
    background: rgba(246,241,232,0.88);
    color: var(--ink);
    font-family: 'Montserrat', Arial, sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.94rem;
    outline: none;
  }

  .team-search:focus{
    border-color: var(--red);
    box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(169,54,50,0.13);
  }

  .team-filter-buttons{
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 0.45rem;
  }

  .team-filter{
    border: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.28);
    background: rgba(246,241,232,0.86);
    color: var(--green-dark);
    border-radius: 999px;
    padding: 0.48rem 0.72rem;
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 0.66rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.06em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    cursor: pointer;
  }

  .team-filter.active,
  .team-filter:hover{
    background: var(--red);
    border-color: var(--red);
    color: #fff;
  }

  .team-index{
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 0.74rem;
    line-height: 1.9;
    color: var(--muted);
    text-align: center;
  }

  .team-index a{
    text-decoration: none;
    margin: 0 3px;
    color: var(--red);
    font-weight: 700;
  }

  .team-index a:hover{
    color: var(--green-dark);
    text-decoration: underline;
  }

  .team-index span{
    margin: 0 3px;
  }

  /* SEÇÕES DA EQUIPE */

  .team-section{
    scroll-margin-top: 6rem;
  }

  .team-section-header{
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    gap: 1rem;
    align-items: end;
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
    padding-bottom: 0.75rem;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.18);
  }

  .team-section-header h3{
    margin: 0;
    color: var(--green-dark);
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 0.82rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.12em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }

  .team-section-header p{
    margin: 0 !important;
    color: var(--muted) !important;
    font-size: 0.86rem !important;
    line-height: 1.4 !important;
    max-width: 34rem;
    text-align: right;
  }

  .team-grid{
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(0, 1fr));
    gap: 0.9rem;
    align-items: stretch;
  }

  .team-card{
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
    background: rgba(255,253,247,0.96);
    border: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.18);
    border-top: 4px solid var(--green);
    border-radius: 18px;
    box-shadow: 0 10px 22px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
    padding: 0.82rem;
    width: 100%;
    min-height: 100%;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-rows: auto 1fr;
    transition: transform 0.22s ease, box-shadow 0.22s ease, border-color 0.22s ease;
  }

  .team-card::before{
    content: "";
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background:
      radial-gradient(circle at 92% 6%, rgba(217,154,39,0.11), transparent 24%),
      linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(246,241,232,0), rgba(98,106,56,0.035));
    pointer-events: none;
  }

  .team-card:hover{
    transform: translateY(-3px);
    box-shadow: 0 16px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
    border-top-color: var(--red);
    z-index: 2;
  }

  .team-card[data-role="responsavel"]{
    border-top-color: var(--ochre);
  }

  .team-photo-wrap{
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
  }

  .team-photo{
    width: 100%;
    height: clamp(168px, 14vw, 215px);
    object-fit: cover;
    object-position: center;
    border-radius: 14px;
    border: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.16);
    box-shadow: 0 8px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.09);
    display: block;
    background: var(--green-soft);
  }

  .team-photo-default{
    object-fit: contain;
    padding: 0.65rem;
    background: rgba(215,221,197,0.78);
  }

  .team-info{
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    text-align: left;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-rows: 2.35rem 3.05rem 1.75rem auto;
    align-content: start;
    gap: 0.36rem;
  }

  .team-name{
    margin: 0;
    color: var(--green-dark);
    font-family: 'Montserrat', Arial, sans-serif;
    font-size: clamp(0.95rem, 1.05vw, 1.05rem);
    line-height: 1.18;
    font-weight: 850;
    text-align: left;
    letter-spacing: -0.015em;
    display: -webkit-box;
    -webkit-line-clamp: 2;
    -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .team-card[data-role="responsavel"] .team-name{
    color: var(--red-dark);
  }

  .team-project-role{
    margin: 0;
    color: var(--red-dark);
    font-family: 'Montserrat', Arial, sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.74rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    line-height: 1.34;
    letter-spacing: 0.01em;
    padding-left: 0.55rem;
    border-left: 3px solid rgba(217,154,39,0.76);
    display: -webkit-box;
    -webkit-line-clamp: 3;
    -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .team-card[data-role="integrante"] .team-project-role{
    color: var(--green-dark);
    border-left-color: rgba(98,106,56,0.55);
  }

  .team-project-role-empty{
    border-left-color: transparent;
    padding-left: 0;
  }

  .team-institution{
    margin: 0;
    color: var(--muted);
    font-size: 0.82rem;
    line-height: 1.38;
    display: flex;
    align-items: start;
  }

  .team-institution-empty{
    min-height: 1.1rem;
  }

  .team-icons{
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 0.25rem;
    margin: 0.12rem 0 0 0;
    min-height: 0;
    padding-top: 0.45rem;
    border-top: 1px dashed rgba(98,106,56,0.22);
  }

  .icon-link{
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    width: 28px;
    height: 28px;
    margin: 0 4px 4px 0;
    border-radius: 999px;
    background: rgba(246,241,232,0.88);
    border: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.24);
    transition: transform 0.18s ease, background 0.18s ease;
  }

  .icon-link:hover{
    transform: translateY(-1px);
    background: rgba(217,154,39,0.16);
  }

  .icon-link img{
    width: 15px;
    height: 15px;
    vertical-align: middle;
  }

  .team-card[hidden],
  .team-grid[hidden]{
    display: none !important;
  }

  .empty-team-message{
    display: none;
    padding: 1rem;
    background: rgba(255,253,247,0.74);
    border: 1px dashed rgba(169,54,50,0.32);
    border-radius: 14px;
    color: var(--muted);
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    line-height: 1.55;
  }

  @media (max-width: 991.98px){
    .page-hero{
      min-height: 100vh;
    }

    .page-hero-logo{
      top: 4.9rem;
      left: 0.75rem;
      width: 78px;
    }

    .page-hero-content{
      top: 11.4rem;
      left: 0.75rem;
      width: calc(100% - 1.5rem);
    }

    #quarto-header .navbar-collapse.show,
    #quarto-header .navbar-collapse.collapsing {
      margin-top: 0.6rem;
      padding: 0.85rem 1rem;
      width: min(280px, calc(100% - 2rem));
      background: rgba(23, 23, 23, 0.72) !important;
      border: 1px solid rgba(246, 241, 232, 0.22);
      border-radius: 18px;
      box-shadow: 0 14px 30px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.28);
      backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
      -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
    }

    #quarto-header .navbar-collapse.show .nav-link,
    #quarto-header .navbar-collapse.collapsing .nav-link {
      color: #F6F1E8 !important;
      font-weight: 600;
      padding: 0.45rem 0.25rem;
      text-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9);
    }

    .team-overview-grid{
      grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    }

    .team-section-header{
      align-items: start;
      flex-direction: column;
    }

    .team-section-header p{
      text-align: left;
    }

    .team-grid{
      grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
    }
  }

  @media (max-width: 820px){
    .content-card,
    .team-controls{
      width: calc(100% - 1rem);
      padding: 1.35rem 1rem;
    }

    .section-title{
      grid-template-columns: 56px 1fr;
    }
  }

  @media (max-width: 760px){
    .team-grid{
      grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
    }
  }

  @media (max-width: 640px){
    .team-grid{
      grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    }

    .team-photo{
      height: 260px;
    }

    .team-info{
      grid-template-rows: auto auto auto auto;
    }

    .team-search-row{
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    }
  }

  @media (max-width: 520px){
    .page-hero-logo{
      display: none;
    }

    .page-hero-content h1{
      font-size: clamp(2.8rem, 15vw, 4.2rem);
    }

    .btn-main,
    .btn-ghost{
      width: 100%;
    }
  }

  /* ===== Full-bleed hero sem overflow horizontal ===== */

  html,
  body{
    width: 100% !important;
    max-width: 100% !important;
    overflow-x: hidden !important;
  }

  #quarto-content,
  .page-columns,
  .page-layout-full,
  main,
  main.content,
  .content{
    width: 100% !important;
    max-width: 100% !important;
    overflow-x: hidden !important;
  }

  .page-hero{
    left: 50% !important;
    transform: translateX(-50%) !important;
    width: 100vw !important;
    max-width: 100vw !important;
    margin-left: 0 !important;
    margin-right: 0 !important;
  }

  @supports (width: 100dvw){
    .page-hero{
      width: 100dvw !important;
      max-width: 100dvw !important;
    }
  }

  .content-card,
  .team-controls{
    width: min(1280px, calc(100% - 2rem)) !important;
    max-width: calc(100% - 2rem) !important;
    margin-left: auto !important;
    margin-right: auto !important;
  }

  .team-grid,
  .team-card,
  .team-card *,
  .team-photo-wrap,
  .team-photo,
  .team-info{
    max-width: 100% !important;
    min-width: 0 !important;
  }

  #pesquisadores-responsaveis .team-grid{
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr)) !important;
  }

  #integrantes .team-grid{
    grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(0, 1fr)) !important;
  }

  @media (max-width: 1320px){
    #integrantes .team-grid{
      grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr)) !important;
    }
  }

  @media (max-width: 991.98px){
    #pesquisadores-responsaveis .team-grid,
    #integrantes .team-grid{
      grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr)) !important;
    }

    .content-card,
    .team-controls{
      width: calc(100% - 1rem) !important;
      max-width: calc(100% - 1rem) !important;
    }
  }

  @media (max-width: 640px){
    #pesquisadores-responsaveis .team-grid,
    #integrantes .team-grid{
      grid-template-columns: 1fr !important;
    }
  }

</style>
```

```{=html}
<section class="page-hero page-hero-team" aria-label="Abertura da página da equipe">
  <div class="page-hero-overlay"></div>

  <div class="page-hero-logo" aria-label="Logo Tsiino Hiiwiida">
    <img
      src="../figures/logo_tsiino.png"
      alt="Logo Tsiino Hiiwiida"
      onerror="this.style.display='none';"
    >
  </div>

  <div class="page-hero-content">
    <div class="hero-kicker">Equipe científica · Tsiino Hiiwiida</div>
    <h1>Equipe</h1>
    <p class="hero-subtitle">Pesquisadores, instituições e colaboradores do projeto</p>
    <p class="hero-description">
    </p>

    <div class="hero-actions">
      <a class="btn-main" href="#pesquisadores-responsaveis">Pesquisadores responsáveis</a>
      <a class="btn-ghost" href="#integrantes">Integrantes</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
```

```{=html}
<section id="visao-geral-equipe" class="content-card">
  <div class="section-title">
    <h2>Rede do projeto</h2>
  </div>

  <div class="team-overview-grid">
    <div>
      <p class="lead">
        A equipe do Tsiino Hiiwiida reúne pesquisadores responsáveis, estudantes, colaboradores e instituições parceiras em uma rede voltada à documentação da biodiversidade de plantas e fungos na Cabeça do Cachorro, Alto Rio Negro.
      </p>

      <p>
        Nesta página, os pesquisadores responsáveis aparecem primeiro, na mesma ordem apresentada na seção de coordenação científica da página inicial. Em seguida, aparecem os demais integrantes do projeto, mantendo a busca por nome, cargo no projeto ou instituição.
      </p>
    </div>

    <div class="team-summary-box">
```

```{r team-summary, results='asis'}
tagList(
  tags$div(
    tags$span(class = "team-number", nrow(responsaveis)),
    tags$span(class = "team-label", "pesquisadores responsáveis")
  ),
  tags$div(
    tags$span(class = "team-number", nrow(integrantes)),
    tags$span(class = "team-label", "integrantes")
  ),
  tags$div(
    tags$span(class = "team-number", nrow(team_ordered)),
    tags$span(class = "team-label", "pessoas cadastradas")
  )
)
```

```{=html}
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
```

```{r generate-team-cards, include=FALSE}
make_icon <- function(href, icon_file, alt, is_email = FALSE) {
  if (!nz(href)) return("")

  href_safe <- htmlEscape(href)
  icon_src <- paste0("../_input_data/icons/", icon_file)

  if (is_email) {
    paste0(
      '<a class="icon-link" href="mailto:', href_safe, '" aria-label="', alt, '">',
      '<img src="', icon_src, '" alt="', alt, '"/>',
      '</a>'
    )
  } else {
    paste0(
      '<a class="icon-link" href="', href_safe, '" target="_blank" rel="noopener" aria-label="', alt, '">',
      '<img src="', icon_src, '" alt="', alt, '"/>',
      '</a>'
    )
  }
}

generate_member_card <- function(member) {
  email <- get_value(member, c("Email", "email", "E.mail", "E.mail."))

  institution <- get_value(
    member,
    c(
      "Instituicao de origem",
      "Instituição de origem",
      "Instituicao.de.origem",
      "Instituição.de.origem",
      "Instituicao.origem",
      "Instituição.origem",
      "Institution",
      "Instittution",
      "Institution.",
      "Affiliation",
      "Instituicao",
      "Instituição"
    )
  )

  project_role <- get_value(
    member,
    c(
      "Cargo no projeto",
      "Cargo.no.projeto",
      "Cargo",
      "Participacao no projeto",
      "Participação no projeto",
      "Participacao.no.projeto",
      "Participação.no.projeto",
      "Participacao",
      "Participação",
      "Funcao no projeto",
      "Função no projeto",
      "Funcao.no.projeto",
      "Função.no.projeto",
      "Funcao",
      "Função",
      "Project role",
      "Project.Role",
      "ProjectRole",
      "Role"
    )
  )

  lattes <- get_value(member, c("Lattes", "Lattes.", "lattes"))
  orcid <- get_value(member, c("ORCID", "Orcid", "orcid", "ORCID."))
  scholar <- get_value(member, c("Google.Scholar", "Google.Scholar.", "GoogleScholar", "Scholar"))
  website <- get_value(member, c("Personal.Website", "Personal.Website.", "Website", "PersonalWebsite"))

  icon_html <- paste0(
    make_icon(email, "_email.png", "Email", is_email = TRUE),
    make_icon(lattes, "_lattes.png", "Lattes"),
    make_icon(orcid, "_orcid.png", "ORCID"),
    make_icon(scholar, "_scholar.png", "Google Scholar"),
    make_icon(website, "website.png", "Website")
  )

  role <- member$team_role[1]

  photo_file_name <- basename(member$photo_path[1])
  photo_class <- if (photo_file_name %in% default_candidates || identical(photo_file_name, default_file)) {
    "team-photo team-photo-default"
  } else {
    "team-photo"
  }

  search_text <- paste(
    member$Member[1],
    project_role,
    institution,
    role,
    sep = " "
  )

  project_role_html <- if (nz(project_role)) {
    paste0(
      '<p class="team-project-role">',
      htmlEscape(project_role),
      '</p>'
    )
  } else {
    '<p class="team-project-role team-project-role-empty" aria-hidden="true"></p>'
  }

  institution_html <- if (nz(institution)) {
    paste0(
      '<p class="team-institution">',
      htmlEscape(institution),
      '</p>'
    )
  } else {
    '<p class="team-institution team-institution-empty" aria-hidden="true"></p>'
  }

  icons_html <- if (nz(icon_html)) {
    paste0(
      '<p class="team-icons">',
      icon_html,
      '</p>'
    )
  } else {
    '<p class="team-icons team-icons-empty" aria-hidden="true"></p>'
  }

  paste0(
    '<article class="team-card" id="', htmlEscape(member$member_slug[1]),
    '" data-role="', role,
    '" data-name="', htmlEscape(tolower(member$Member[1])),
    '" data-institution="', htmlEscape(tolower(institution)),
    '" data-project-role="', htmlEscape(tolower(project_role)),
    '" data-search="', htmlEscape(tolower(search_text)),
    '">',

      '<div class="team-photo-wrap">',
        '<img src="', htmlEscape(member$photo_path[1]),
        '" alt="', htmlEscape(member$Member[1]),
        '" class="', photo_class, '" loading="lazy" decoding="async"/>',
      '</div>',

      '<div class="team-info">',
        '<h3 class="team-name">', htmlEscape(member$Member[1]), '</h3>',
        project_role_html,
        institution_html,
        icons_html,
      '</div>',

    '</article>'
  )
}
render_team_grid <- function(data) {
  if (nrow(data) == 0) {
    return(HTML('<div class="empty-team-message" style="display:block;">Nenhum membro cadastrado nesta categoria.</div>'))
  }

  HTML(paste0(
    '<div class="team-grid">',
    paste(vapply(seq_len(nrow(data)), function(i) generate_member_card(data[i, , drop = FALSE]), character(1)), collapse = ""),
    '</div>'
  ))
}

letters_present <- unique(toupper(substr(normalize_name(team_ordered$Member), 1, 1)))
letter_links <- vapply(LETTERS, function(letter) {
  hit <- team_ordered$member_slug[team_ordered$first_letter == letter][1]
  if (!is.na(hit) && nz(hit)) {
    paste0('<a href="#', hit, '">', letter, '</a>')
  } else {
    paste0('<span style="color:#ccc; cursor:default;">', letter, '</span>')
  }
}, character(1))
```

```{=html}
<div class="team-controls" aria-label="Controles de busca e filtro da equipe">
  <div class="team-search-row">
    <input type="text" id="team-search" class="team-search" placeholder="Buscar por nome, cargo no projeto ou instituição..." />

    <div class="team-filter-buttons" aria-label="Filtros da equipe">
      <button class="team-filter active" type="button" data-filter="all">Todos</button>
      <button class="team-filter" type="button" data-filter="responsavel">Responsáveis</button>
      <button class="team-filter" type="button" data-filter="integrante">Integrantes</button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="team-index">
```

```{r render-letter-index, results='asis'}
HTML(paste(letter_links, collapse = " | "))
```

```{=html}
  </div>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<section id="pesquisadores-responsaveis" class="content-card team-section" data-section-role="responsavel">
  <div class="section-title">
    <h2>Pesquisadores responsáveis</h2>
  </div>

  <div class="team-section-header">
  </div>
```

```{r render-responsaveis, results='asis'}
render_team_grid(responsaveis)
```

```{=html}
  <div class="empty-team-message">Nenhum pesquisador responsável corresponde à busca atual.</div>
</section>
```

```{=html}
<section id="integrantes" class="content-card team-section" data-section-role="integrante">
  <div class="section-title">
    <h2>Integrantes</h2>
  </div>

  <div class="team-section-header">
    <h3>Equipe ampliada</h3>
    <p></p>
  </div>
```

```{r render-integrantes, results='asis'}
render_team_grid(integrantes)
```

```{=html}
  <div class="empty-team-message">Nenhum integrante corresponde à busca atual.</div>
</section>
```

```{=html}
<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
  const searchInput = document.getElementById("team-search");
  const filterButtons = document.querySelectorAll(".team-filter");
  const cards = document.querySelectorAll(".team-card");
  const sections = document.querySelectorAll(".team-section");
  let activeFilter = "all";

  function normalizeText(value) {
    return (value || "")
      .toLowerCase()
      .normalize("NFD")
      .replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g, "")
      .replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, " ")
      .trim();
  }

  function applyFilters() {
    const term = normalizeText(searchInput ? searchInput.value : "");

    cards.forEach(function (card) {
      const role = card.dataset.role || "";
      const haystack = normalizeText(
        (card.dataset.search || "") + " " +
        (card.dataset.name || "") + " " +
        (card.dataset.institution || "") + " " +
        (card.dataset.projectRole || "") + " " +
        (card.textContent || "")
      );
      const words = term.split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean);
      const matchesText = words.length === 0 || words.every(word => haystack.includes(word));
      const matchesRole = activeFilter === "all" || role === activeFilter;

      card.hidden = !(matchesText && matchesRole);
    });

    sections.forEach(function (section) {
      const visibleCards = Array.from(section.querySelectorAll(".team-card")).filter(function (card) {
        return !card.hidden;
      });
      const empty = section.querySelector(".empty-team-message");
      const grid = section.querySelector(".team-grid");

      if (empty) empty.style.display = visibleCards.length ? "none" : "block";
      if (grid) grid.hidden = !visibleCards.length;
    });
  }

  if (searchInput) {
    searchInput.addEventListener("input", applyFilters);
  }

  filterButtons.forEach(function (button) {
    button.addEventListener("click", function () {
      activeFilter = button.dataset.filter || "all";
      filterButtons.forEach(btn => btn.classList.remove("active"));
      button.classList.add("active");
      applyFilters();
    });
  });

  applyFilters();
});
</script>
```

```{=html}
<style>
/* ===== PATCH FINAL — hero da página Equipe em largura total real =====
   Mantém os filtros alfabéticos e a busca como estão, mas impede que
   ancestrais do Quarto cortem o full-bleed da faixa do título. */

html,
body {
  width: 100% !important;
  max-width: 100% !important;
  margin-left: 0 !important;
  margin-right: 0 !important;
  overflow-x: hidden !important;
}

body {
  position: relative !important;
}

/* O full-bleed precisa de overflow visível nos contêineres do Quarto.
   O overflow horizontal é bloqueado apenas em html/body. */
#quarto-content,
.page-columns,
.page-layout-full,
main,
main.content,
.content {
  width: 100% !important;
  max-width: none !important;
  margin-left: 0 !important;
  margin-right: 0 !important;
  overflow-x: visible !important;
}

/* Faixa do título: ocupa 100% do viewport, independentemente da largura
   do contêiner central onde o QMD foi renderizado. */
.page-hero,
.page-hero.page-hero-team {
  position: relative !important;
  display: block !important;
  left: auto !important;
  right: auto !important;
  transform: none !important;
  width: 100vw !important;
  min-width: 100vw !important;
  max-width: 100vw !important;
  margin-left: calc(50% - 50vw) !important;
  margin-right: calc(50% - 50vw) !important;
  margin-top: 0 !important;
  margin-bottom: 0 !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
  overflow: hidden !important;
  isolation: isolate !important;
}

@supports (width: 100dvw) {
  .page-hero,
  .page-hero.page-hero-team {
    width: 100dvw !important;
    min-width: 100dvw !important;
    max-width: 100dvw !important;
    margin-left: calc(50% - 50dvw) !important;
    margin-right: calc(50% - 50dvw) !important;
  }
}

.page-hero-team {
  background-image:
    linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(0,0,0,0.78) 0%, rgba(0,0,0,0.48) 46%, rgba(0,0,0,0.10) 100%),
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(0,0,0,0.10) 0%, rgba(0,0,0,0.68) 100%),
    url("../figures/equipe.jpg") !important;
  background-size: cover !important;
  background-position: center center !important;
  background-repeat: no-repeat !important;
}

.page-hero-overlay {
  pointer-events: none !important;
}

.page-hero-content {
  left: clamp(1.25rem, 5vw, 5rem) !important;
  width: min(900px, calc(100vw - 2.5rem)) !important;
  max-width: calc(100vw - 2.5rem) !important;
}

.page-hero-logo {
  left: clamp(1.25rem, 3.5vw, 2.5rem) !important;
}

/* Mantém as seções abaixo contidas para não criar rolagem lateral. */
.content-card,
.team-controls {
  width: min(1280px, calc(100vw - 2rem)) !important;
  max-width: calc(100vw - 2rem) !important;
  margin-left: auto !important;
  margin-right: auto !important;
  overflow: hidden !important;
}

.team-overview-grid,
.team-search-row,
.team-filter-buttons,
.team-index,
.team-grid,
.team-card,
.team-card *,
.team-photo-wrap,
.team-photo,
.team-info {
  min-width: 0 !important;
  max-width: 100% !important;
}

@media (max-width: 991.98px) {
  .page-hero,
  .page-hero.page-hero-team {
    min-height: 100vh !important;
  }

  .page-hero-content {
    top: 11.4rem !important;
    left: 0.85rem !important;
    width: calc(100vw - 1.7rem) !important;
    max-width: calc(100vw - 1.7rem) !important;
  }

  .page-hero-logo {
    left: 0.85rem !important;
  }

  .content-card,
  .team-controls {
    width: calc(100vw - 1rem) !important;
    max-width: calc(100vw - 1rem) !important;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 640px) {
  .page-hero-content {
    left: 0.85rem !important;
    width: calc(100vw - 1.7rem) !important;
    max-width: calc(100vw - 1.7rem) !important;
  }

  .content-card,
  .team-controls {
    width: calc(100vw - 0.75rem) !important;
    max-width: calc(100vw - 0.75rem) !important;
  }
}
</style>
```

```{=html}
<style>
/* ======================================================================
   PATCH FINAL — Equipe sem escape horizontal + cards mais confortáveis
   ----------------------------------------------------------------------
   Este bloco precisa ficar no final do QMD para sobrescrever as regras
   anteriores que usavam 100vw nos cards. A hero continua full-bleed.
   ====================================================================== */

html,
body {
  width: 100% !important;
  max-width: 100% !important;
  margin-left: 0 !important;
  margin-right: 0 !important;
  overflow-x: hidden !important;
}

@supports (overflow-x: clip) {
  html,
  body {
    overflow-x: clip !important;
  }
}

*,
*::before,
*::after {
  box-sizing: border-box !important;
}

img,
video,
svg,
canvas,
iframe {
  max-width: 100% !important;
}

/* Contêineres do Quarto: não devem limitar a faixa da hero,
   mas também não podem gerar largura extra nos cards. */
#quarto-content,
.page-columns,
.page-layout-full,
main,
main.content,
.content,
#quarto-document-content {
  width: 100% !important;
  max-width: 100% !important;
  min-width: 0 !important;
  margin-left: 0 !important;
  margin-right: 0 !important;
  padding-left: 0 !important;
  padding-right: 0 !important;
  overflow-x: visible !important;
}

/* A faixa do título permanece em largura total da tela. */
.page-hero,
.page-hero.page-hero-team {
  position: relative !important;
  display: block !important;
  left: auto !important;
  right: auto !important;
  transform: none !important;
  width: 100vw !important;
  min-width: 100vw !important;
  max-width: 100vw !important;
  margin-left: calc(50% - 50vw) !important;
  margin-right: calc(50% - 50vw) !important;
  margin-top: 0 !important;
  margin-bottom: 0 !important;
  overflow: hidden !important;
}

@supports (width: 100dvw) {
  .page-hero,
  .page-hero.page-hero-team {
    width: 100dvw !important;
    min-width: 100dvw !important;
    max-width: 100dvw !important;
    margin-left: calc(50% - 50dvw) !important;
    margin-right: calc(50% - 50dvw) !important;
  }
}

/* Seções abaixo da hero: agora usam a largura real do contêiner,
   não 100vw. Isso resolve o escape à direita em notebook menor. */
.content-card,
.team-controls,
#visao-geral-equipe.content-card,
#pesquisadores-responsaveis.content-card,
#integrantes.content-card {
  position: relative !important;
  left: auto !important;
  right: auto !important;
  transform: none !important;
  width: min(1280px, calc(100% - 2rem)) !important;
  max-width: calc(100% - 2rem) !important;
  min-width: 0 !important;
  margin-left: auto !important;
  margin-right: auto !important;
  overflow: hidden !important;
}

/* Em telas de notebook menores, deixa uma margem segura sem usar 100vw. */
@media (max-width: 1368px) {
  .content-card,
  .team-controls,
  #visao-geral-equipe.content-card,
  #pesquisadores-responsaveis.content-card,
  #integrantes.content-card {
    width: min(1220px, calc(100% - 1.25rem)) !important;
    max-width: calc(100% - 1.25rem) !important;
    padding-left: clamp(0.95rem, 2vw, 1.6rem) !important;
    padding-right: clamp(0.95rem, 2vw, 1.6rem) !important;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 760px) {
  .content-card,
  .team-controls,
  #visao-geral-equipe.content-card,
  #pesquisadores-responsaveis.content-card,
  #integrantes.content-card {
    width: calc(100% - 0.75rem) !important;
    max-width: calc(100% - 0.75rem) !important;
    padding-left: 0.95rem !important;
    padding-right: 0.95rem !important;
  }
}

/* Tudo dentro das seções da equipe respeita a largura do pai. */
.team-overview-grid,
.team-summary-box,
.team-search-row,
.team-filter-buttons,
.team-index,
.team-section,
.team-section-header,
.team-grid,
.team-card,
.team-card *,
.team-photo-wrap,
.team-photo,
.team-info,
.team-icons {
  min-width: 0 !important;
  max-width: 100% !important;
}

/* Grade dos cards: 3 responsáveis no desktop largo, mas sem forçar
   3 colunas quando o notebook estiver estreito. */
#pesquisadores-responsaveis .team-grid {
  display: grid !important;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr)) !important;
  gap: clamp(0.85rem, 1.25vw, 1.15rem) !important;
  width: 100% !important;
  max-width: 100% !important;
  overflow: hidden !important;
}

#integrantes .team-grid {
  display: grid !important;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(0, 1fr)) !important;
  gap: clamp(0.85rem, 1.25vw, 1.15rem) !important;
  width: 100% !important;
  max-width: 100% !important;
  overflow: hidden !important;
}

@media (max-width: 1368px) {
  #integrantes .team-grid {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr)) !important;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 1120px) {
  #pesquisadores-responsaveis .team-grid,
  #integrantes .team-grid {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr)) !important;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 640px) {
  #pesquisadores-responsaveis .team-grid,
  #integrantes .team-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr !important;
  }
}

/* Card: evita que conteúdo interno empurre a largura do card. */
.team-card {
  width: 100% !important;
  max-width: 100% !important;
  min-width: 0 !important;
  overflow: hidden !important;
  padding: clamp(0.85rem, 1.15vw, 1rem) !important;
  display: flex !important;
  flex-direction: column !important;
}

/* Foto menos horizontal: formato quadrado para não cortar tanto retratos
   nem deixar o default largo demais. */
.team-photo-wrap {
  width: 100% !important;
  aspect-ratio: 1 / 1 !important;
  margin-bottom: 1rem !important;
  border-radius: 16px !important;
  overflow: hidden !important;
  background: rgba(215,221,197,0.78) !important;
}

.team-photo {
  width: 100% !important;
  height: 100% !important;
  aspect-ratio: 1 / 1 !important;
  object-fit: cover !important;
  object-position: center 38% !important;
  border-radius: 16px !important;
  display: block !important;
}

.team-photo-default {
  object-fit: contain !important;
  object-position: center center !important;
  padding: clamp(1.05rem, 9%, 2rem) !important;
  background: rgba(215,221,197,0.78) !important;
}

/* Conteúdo textual: remove linhas fixas que causavam sobreposição entre
   instituição e ícones/links. */
.team-info {
  display: flex !important;
  flex-direction: column !important;
  flex: 1 1 auto !important;
  grid-template-rows: none !important;
  align-content: stretch !important;
  gap: 0.62rem !important;
  min-height: 0 !important;
  overflow: visible !important;
}

.team-name {
  min-height: 2.45rem !important;
  max-width: 100% !important;
  overflow-wrap: break-word !important;
}

.team-project-role {
  min-height: 3.1rem !important;
  margin-top: 0.1rem !important;
  max-width: 100% !important;
  overflow-wrap: break-word !important;
}

.team-institution {
  display: block !important;
  margin-top: 0.25rem !important;
  margin-bottom: 0.7rem !important;
  min-height: 2.8rem !important;
  max-width: 100% !important;
  color: var(--ink) !important;
  font-size: clamp(0.86rem, 1vw, 0.98rem) !important;
  line-height: 1.42 !important;
  overflow-wrap: break-word !important;
}

.team-institution-empty {
  min-height: 2.8rem !important;
}

.team-icons {
  display: flex !important;
  flex-wrap: wrap !important;
  align-items: center !important;
  gap: 0.42rem !important;
  margin-top: auto !important;
  padding-top: 0.8rem !important;
  border-top: 1px dashed rgba(98,106,56,0.26) !important;
  min-height: 2.45rem !important;
  overflow: visible !important;
}

.icon-link {
  width: 31px !important;
  height: 31px !important;
  margin: 0 !important;
  flex: 0 0 31px !important;
}

.icon-link img {
  width: 16px !important;
  height: 16px !important;
}

/* Busca, filtros e títulos longos não devem gerar largura extra. */
.team-search,
.team-filter,
.section-title,
.section-title h2,
.team-section-header h3,
.team-section-header p,
.team-name,
.team-project-role,
.team-institution {
  max-width: 100% !important;
  overflow-wrap: break-word !important;
  word-break: normal !important;
}
</style>
```
